arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers player rules out move to specific league – Already snubbed two clubs
arts.sum: On Friday, Blackburn Rovers omitted Arnór Sigurðsson from their 25-man squad for the Championship. The winger was frustrated and surprised with Blackburn Rovers’ decision and stated they have left him in an ‘impossible situation’. The transfer windows across the major European leagues have closed, making it difficult for him to find a new club. arts.ttl: Blackburn boss Eustace set for Derby move
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers "reluctantly" give boss John Eustace permission to speak to another Championship club after Derby make approach.
